description: Model a 15 mm thick extruded C-clamp frame in SolveSpace. The profile must be defined by an outer arc (radius 50 mm) and an inner arc (radius 30 mm) centered at the origin (0,0), with horizontal arms extending to X = 40 mm. The top arm should be bounded by Y = 30 and Y = 50, and the bottom arm by Y = -50 and Y = -30. Incorporate a Ø 10 mm through-hole centered at X = 25 mm that passes vertically through the top arm. Save the completed model to ~/Documents/SolveSpace/c_clamp_frame.slvs.
